message.content:
(1) PASS - Main content (welcome message, date, stat cards, chart) is visible and readable with appropriate font sizes.  
(2) PASS - Stat cards are arranged in a 2-column grid (2 cards per row).  
(3) PASS - No horizontal overflow; all elements fit within the 390px width.  
(4) PASS - Header search bar is visible at the top.  

No layout problems detected.
